quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Ensure visual continuity and structure across clinical data visualization elements.
rules.rule_text: Chart and infographic containers must use the Light Blue (#E6F0F9) background panel with uniform rounded corners (radius = 12px) and a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar.

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Maintain accurate and consistent color coding to aid fast data interpretation.
rules.rule_text: Chart graphics must use Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) as the dominant palette. Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are strictly reserved for highlighting or emphasizing key figures/data points. Placebos or comparators must be rendered in neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Align medical data graphics with the friendly, approachable brand identity.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must feature rounded, approachable shapes (specifically using rounded tops for bars).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Establish structural and visual hierarchy for chart headings.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines must be styled in Nunito Sans Bold (or Agenda Bold for print layouts), rendered in ALL CAPS (case.campaign.all_caps = all_caps), using Brand Blue (#00529b), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule running beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Maintain immediate readability of primary efficacy or safety data in scientific displays.
rules.rule_text: In clinical chart callouts, the statistical percentage value must be the visual hero (large and bold), with its supporting descriptive copy positioned directly beneath it in a lighter weight. Footnotes must be styled noticeably smaller and remain clearly separated from primary statistical data blocks.
